creator: Kay Gregg & Caitlin Crowley
description: Learn more about Internet Archive's Midwest Regional Digitization Center.  Jeff Sharpe, Midwest Regional Coordinator, gives a tour and shares some rare items digitized at the center. Curt Witcher, Geneology Center Manager, and Lincoln historian, Adriana Harmeyer, give their thoughts on digitization and preserving history. Videography by Kay Gregg Written by Caitlin Crowley
